name: question locked
value: Can CRA internalize the temporal-basis capability exposed by random-projection/nonlinear-lag controls as organism-native dynamics rather than a host-side adapter?

name: hypothesis locked
value: A CRA-native sparse temporal expansion mechanism with causal delay/trace branches and thresholded nonlinear branch units can recover the useful temporal-interface signal while separating from random projection, nonlinear-lag controls, and internal ablations.
